description: Tests that the right planning skill is selected based on tumor type. StandardPlanningSkill, LiverFullSkill, and LungFullSkill each have organ-specific ref_direc defaults. Bot should pick the right one and apply its parameters.

cases.input: Plan brachytherapy for this pancreatic tumor
Plan brachytherapy for this liver tumor
Plan brachytherapy for this lung tumor
Plan brachytherapy for this prostate tumor
cases._comment: Should use StandardPlanningSkill with prostate template

cases.input: Plan brachytherapy for this head and neck tumor
cases._comment: Should use StandardPlanningSkill with head_neck defaults

cases.input: Plan a pancreatic tumor with a posterior approach
cases._comment: Should use StandardPlanningSkill (its default is already posterior for pancreas)

cases.input: Plan a liver tumor with an anterior approach
cases._comment: Liver default is lateral; anterior should be flagged as unusual

cases.input: What brachytherapy planning approaches does the system support?
cases._comment: Should mention the three skills by name
